project.name: The Witness
project.local_vantage: subtle; do not overfocus on location
project.editorial_mandate: Maintain non-Western vantage point. Prevent US-centric tech feed bias. Weight regional and Global South voices equally with Western sources.

sources.title: US House passes resolution calling for end to war on Iran, rebuking Trump
sources.author: none@none.com (ReutersAFP)
sources.summary: The Republican-led US House of Representatives approved a resolution on Wednesday to block President Donald Trump from continuing the war against Iran, reflecting growing concern among members of his party about the three-month-old conflict.
